info.name: Add Users (Excel)
info.description: Bulk add users via Excel upload. Use form-data with key `file` and select an .xlsx with columns: Name, Email, College, Branch, Batch.

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx) with columns: Name, Email, College, Branch, Batch

request.description: Upload an Excel file to bulk add users. Response: status, saved count, notadded count, data (list of emails that failed).
